parameters.query:
SELECT
    i.secid,
    i.engine,
    i.market,
    i.board,
    i.instrument_group,
    i.issuer_name,
    i.news_keywords,
    i.active,
    interval_map.interval_code,
    interval_map.interval_name,
    interval_map.default_days_back,
    interval_map.overlap_days,
    CONCAT('moex:candle:', i.engine, ':', i.market, ':', i.board, ':', i.secid, ':', interval_map.interval_name) AS cursor_key,
    wc.cursor_value,
    wc.payload AS cursor_payload,
    wc.updated_at AS cursor_updated_at
FROM ref.instrument AS i
CROSS JOIN (
    VALUES
        (1, '1m', 1, 1),
        (60, '1h', 7, 2),
        (24, '1d', 45, 7),
        (7, '1w', 365, 21)
) AS interval_map(interval_code, interval_name, default_days_back, overlap_days)
LEFT JOIN meta.workflow_cursor AS wc
    ON wc.workflow_key = CONCAT('moex:candle:', i.engine, ':', i.market, ':', i.board, ':', i.secid, ':', interval_map.interval_name)
WHERE i.active = TRUE
ORDER BY i.secid, interval_map.interval_code;

WITH incoming AS (
    SELECT
        $1::text AS engine,
        $2::text AS market,
        $3::text AS board,
        $4::text AS secid,
        $5::integer AS interval_code,
        $6::text AS interval_name,
        value AS candle
    FROM jsonb_array_elements($7::jsonb) AS value
), upserted AS (
    INSERT INTO raw.candle (
        engine,
        market,
        board,
        secid,
        interval_code,
        interval_name,
        candle_time,
        open,
        high,
        low,
        close,
        volume,
        value,
        begin_at,
        end_at,
        payload,
        collected_at
    )
    SELECT
        engine,
        market,
        board,
        secid,
        interval_code,
        interval_name,
        NULLIF(candle->>'candle_time', '')::timestamptz,
        NULLIF(candle->>'open', '')::numeric,
        NULLIF(candle->>'high', '')::numeric,
        NULLIF(candle->>'low', '')::numeric,
        NULLIF(candle->>'close', '')::numeric,
        NULLIF(candle->>'volume', '')::numeric,
        NULLIF(candle->>'value', '')::numeric,
        NULLIF(candle->>'begin_at', '')::timestamptz,
        NULLIF(candle->>'end_at', '')::timestamptz,
        candle,
        NOW()
    FROM incoming
    WHERE NULLIF(candle->>'candle_time', '') IS NOT NULL
    ON CONFLICT (engine, market, board, secid, interval_name, candle_time)
    DO UPDATE SET
        interval_code = EXCLUDED.interval_code,
        open = EXCLUDED.open,
        high = EXCLUDED.high,
        low = EXCLUDED.low,
        close = EXCLUDED.close,
        volume = EXCLUDED.volume,
        value = EXCLUDED.value,
        begin_at = EXCLUDED.begin_at,
        end_at = EXCLUDED.end_at,
        payload = EXCLUDED.payload,
        collected_at = NOW()
    RETURNING 1
)
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS upserted_rows FROM upserted;

INSERT INTO analytics.instrument_snapshot (
    engine,
    market,
    board,
    secid,
    interval_code,
    interval_name,
    snapshot_at,
    candles_count,
    latest_close,
    change_pct,
    last_volume,
    summary_text,
    payload
)
VALUES (
    $1,
    $2,
    $3,
    $4,
    $5,
    $6,
    NOW(),
    $7,
    $8,
    $9,
    $10,
    $11,
    $12::jsonb
)
RETURNING secid, interval_name, snapshot_at;

INSERT INTO ingest.lightrag_document_log (
    target_kb,
    document_type,
    source_key,
    source_table,
    source_pk,
    document_hash,
    status,
    response_payload,
    published_at
)
VALUES (
    'tradekb',
    $1,
    $2,
    $3,
    $4,
    $5,
    'published',
    $6::jsonb,
    NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (target_kb, source_key)
DO UPDATE SET
    document_type = EXCLUDED.document_type,
    source_table = EXCLUDED.source_table,
    source_pk = EXCLUDED.source_pk,
    document_hash = EXCLUDED.document_hash,
    status = 'published',
    response_payload = EXCLUDED.response_payload,
    published_at = NOW()
RETURNING source_key, status;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ ['candle_snapshot', $('Normalize Candle Snapshot').item.json.source_key, 'analytics.instrument_snapshot', $('Normalize Candle Snapshot').item.json.secid + ':' + $('Normalize Candle Snapshot').item.json.interval_name, $('Normalize Candle Snapshot').item.json.document_hash, JSON.stringify($json)] }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO meta.workflow_cursor (
    workflow_key,
    cursor_value,
    payload,
    updated_at
)
VALUES (
    $1,
    $2,
    $3::jsonb,
    NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (workflow_key)
DO UPDATE SET
    cursor_value = EXCLUDED.cursor_value,
    payload = EXCLUDED.payload,
    updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING workflow_key, cursor_value, updated_at;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $('Normalize Candle Snapshot').item.json.cursor_key, $('Normalize Candle Snapshot').item.json.latest_candle_time, JSON.stringify({ secid: $('Normalize Candle Snapshot').item.json.secid, interval_name: $('Normalize Candle Snapshot').item.json.interval_name, latest_candle_time: $('Normalize Candle Snapshot').item.json.latest_candle_time, request_mode: $('Normalize Candle Snapshot').item.json.request_mode, source_key: $('Normalize Candle Snapshot').item.json.source_key }) ] }}
